# Kamnuanlek.com (คำนวณเลข) — Thailand's Free Online Calculator Platform

> Free Thai-language financial, tax, loan, salary, utility, and health calculators with official Thai government rates. All calculations use current 2569 (2026) rates from the Revenue Department, Social Security Office, MEA/PEA, and Bank of Thailand.

Site: https://www.kamnuanlek.com/
Sitemap: https://www.kamnuanlek.com/sitemap-index.xml
Full URL inventory: https://www.kamnuanlek.com/llms-full.txt

## Tax Calculators (เครื่องคำนวณภาษี)

- [Personal Income Tax Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%A0%E0%B8%B2%E0%B8%A9%E0%B8%B5%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%87%E0%B8%B4%E0%B8%99%E0%B9%84%E0%B8%94%E0%B9%89%E0%B8%9A%E0%B8%B8%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%A5%E0%B8%98%E0%B8%A3%E0%B8%A3%E0%B8%A1%E0%B8%94%E0%B8%B2/): คำนวณภาษีเงินได้บุคคลธรรมดา — Progressive tax brackets, deductions, and allowances per Thai Revenue Department 2569 rates.
- [VAT 7% Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%A0%E0%B8%B2%E0%B8%A9%E0%B8%B5%E0%B8%A1%E0%B8%B9%E0%B8%A5%E0%B8%84%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%B2%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%9E%E0%B8%B4%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%A1/): คำนวณภาษีมูลค่าเพิ่ม — Add VAT to price or extract VAT from VAT-inclusive price. Supports multiple line items.
- [Land & Building Tax Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%A0%E0%B8%B2%E0%B8%A9%E0%B8%B5%E0%B8%97%E0%B8%B5%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%94%E0%B8%B4%E0%B8%99/): คำนวณภาษีที่ดิน — Tiered rates for residential, agricultural, and commercial land per 2569 law.
- [Vehicle Tax Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%84%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%B2%E0%B8%A0%E0%B8%B2%E0%B8%A9%E0%B8%B5%E0%B8%A3%E0%B8%96%E0%B8%A2%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%95%E0%B9%8C/): คำนวณค่าภาษีรถยนต์ — Annual vehicle tax + compulsory insurance for cars, pickups, motorcycles with age discount.

## Loan & Installment Calculators (เครื่องคำนวณสินเชื่อ)

- [Loan Installment Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%9C%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%AD%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%81%E0%B8%B9%E0%B9%89/): คำนวณผ่อนกู้ — Monthly payment for home, car, or personal loans with amortization table.
- [Car Loan Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%9C%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%AD%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A3%E0%B8%96/): คำนวณผ่อนรถ — Car installment with flat rate interest, down payment, and payment schedule.
- [Home Loan Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%9C%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%AD%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%9A%E0%B9%89%E0%B8%B2%E0%B8%99/): คำนวณผ่อนบ้าน — Reducing balance mortgage calculator with refinance comparison.

## Savings & Investment Calculators (เครื่องคำนวณการออม)

- [Deposit Interest Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%94%E0%B8%AD%E0%B8%81%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%9A%E0%B8%B5%E0%B9%89%E0%B8%A2%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%87%E0%B8%B4%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%9D%E0%B8%B2%E0%B8%81/): คำนวณดอกเบี้ยเงินฝาก — Fixed and savings deposit interest after 15% withholding tax.
- [Retirement Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%87%E0%B8%B4%E0%B8%99%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%81%E0%B8%A9%E0%B8%B5%E0%B8%A2%E0%B8%93/): คำนวณเงินเกษียณ — Retirement savings gap analysis with inflation adjustment.
- [Currency Exchange Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%AD%E0%B8%B1%E0%B8%95%E0%B8%A3%E0%B8%B2%E0%B9%81%E0%B8%A5%E0%B8%81%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%9B%E0%B8%A5%E0%B8%B5%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%A2%E0%B8%99/): คำนวณอัตราแลกเปลี่ยน — Multi-currency conversion with spread calculation.
- [Gold Price Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%84%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%B2%E0%B8%97%E0%B8%AD%E0%B8%87%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3/): คำนวณค่าทองคำ — Gold bar and ornamental gold price in baht-weight, salung, and grams.
- [CPI Inflation Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%94%E0%B8%B1%E0%B8%8A%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%B5%E0%B8%A3%E0%B8%B2%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B2%E0%B8%9C%E0%B8%B9%E0%B9%89%E0%B8%9A%E0%B8%A3%E0%B8%B4%E0%B9%82%E0%B8%A0%E0%B8%84/): คำนวณดัชนีราคาผู้บริโภค — Compare THB purchasing power across years using official CPI data.

## Salary & Labor Calculators (เครื่องคำนวณเงินเดือน)

- [Net Salary Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%87%E0%B8%B4%E0%B8%99%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%94%E0%B8%B7%E0%B8%AD%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%AA%E0%B8%B8%E0%B8%97%E0%B8%98%E0%B8%B4/): คำนวณเงินเดือนสุทธิ — Take-home pay after income tax and social security deductions.
- [Minimum Wage Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%84%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%B2%E0%B9%81%E0%B8%A3%E0%B8%87%E0%B8%82%E0%B8%B1%E0%B9%89%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%95%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%B3/): คำนวณค่าแรงขั้นต่ำ — Minimum wage for all 77 Thai provinces, daily and monthly, with OT rates. Updated 2569.
- [Overtime Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%84%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%B2%E0%B9%82%E0%B8%AD%E0%B8%97%E0%B8%B5/): คำนวณค่าโอที — OT at 1.5x, 2x, 3x per Thai Labour Protection Act 2569.
- [Social Security Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%9B%E0%B8%A3%E0%B8%B0%E0%B8%81%E0%B8%B1%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%AA%E0%B8%B1%E0%B8%87%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%A1/): คำนวณประกันสังคม — Social security contributions for Section 33, 39, 40 with employer/government shares.

## Household Expense Calculators (เครื่องคำนวณค่าใช้จ่ายบ้าน)

- [Electricity Bill Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%84%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%B2%E0%B9%84%E0%B8%9F%E0%B8%9F%E0%B9%89%E0%B8%B2/): คำนวณค่าไฟฟ้า — Tiered electricity rates for MEA/PEA with Ft charge and VAT. Updated May-Aug 2569.
- [Water Bill Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%84%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%B2%E0%B8%99%E0%B9%89%E0%B8%B3/): คำนวณค่าน้ำ — Tiered water rates for MWA/PWA with VAT.
- [Property Transfer Fee Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%84%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%B2%E0%B8%98%E0%B8%A3%E0%B8%A3%E0%B8%A1%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%B5%E0%B8%A2%E0%B8%A1%E0%B9%82%E0%B8%AD%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%9A%E0%B9%89%E0%B8%B2%E0%B8%99/): คำนวณค่าธรรมเนียมโอนบ้าน — Transfer fee, mortgage registration, specific business tax, stamp duty.
- [Condo Expense Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%84%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%B2%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%AD%E0%B8%99%E0%B9%82%E0%B8%94/): คำนวณค่าคอนโด — Monthly condo costs: mortgage, common fee, sinking fund, insurance, utilities.
- [Pet Cost Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%84%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%B2%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%A5%E0%B8%B5%E0%B9%89%E0%B8%A2%E0%B8%87%E0%B8%AA%E0%B8%B1%E0%B8%95%E0%B8%A7%E0%B9%8C/): คำนวณค่าเลี้ยงสัตว์ — Monthly cost of owning dogs and cats in Thailand.
- [Tutoring Cost Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%84%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%B2%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%A3%E0%B8%B5%E0%B8%A2%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%9E%E0%B8%B4%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%A8%E0%B8%A9/): คำนวณค่าเรียนพิเศษ — Tutoring cost comparison: private, group, academy by subject and grade.
- [Makeup Cost Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%84%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%B2%E0%B9%81%E0%B8%95%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%87%E0%B8%AB%E0%B8%99%E0%B9%89%E0%B8%B2/): คำนวณค่าแต่งหน้า — Professional makeup cost for weddings, events, daily. Thai market prices 2569.

## Credit Card Calculators (เครื่องคำนวณบัตรเครดิต)

- [Credit Card Interest Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%94%E0%B8%AD%E0%B8%81%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%9A%E0%B8%B5%E0%B9%89%E0%B8%A2%E0%B8%9A%E0%B8%B1%E0%B8%95%E0%B8%A3%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%A3%E0%B8%94%E0%B8%B4%E0%B8%95/): คำนวณดอกเบี้ยบัตรเครดิต — Interest before due date, outstanding balance, minimum payment.
- [Credit Card Installment Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%84%E0%B9%88%E0%B8%B2%E0%B8%87%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%94%E0%B8%9A%E0%B8%B1%E0%B8%95%E0%B8%A3%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%A3%E0%B8%94%E0%B8%B4%E0%B8%95/): คำนวณค่างวดบัตรเครดิต — Minimum payment, total interest, remaining balance per cycle.

## Health & Life Calculators (เครื่องคำนวณสุขภาพ)

- [BMI Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93-bmi/): คำนวณ BMI ดัชนีมวลกาย — Body mass index using WHO Asia-Pacific criteria for Thai/Asian adults.
- [Due Date Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%B1%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%A5%E0%B8%AD%E0%B8%94/): คำนวณวันคลอด — Estimated due date, current gestational age, and trimester.
- [Age Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%AD%E0%B8%B2%E0%B8%A2%E0%B8%B8/): คำนวณอายุ — Age from birthdate with Thai Buddhist Era (พ.ศ.) support, zodiac, and generation.
- [Life Insurance Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B8%9B%E0%B8%A3%E0%B8%B0%E0%B8%81%E0%B8%B1%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%8A%E0%B8%B5%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%B4%E0%B8%95/): คำนวณเบี้ยประกันชีวิต — Compare endowment, whole life, and term life insurance premiums.

## General Tools (เครื่องมือคำนวณทั่วไป)

- [Percentage Calculator](https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%B3%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%93%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%9B%E0%B8%AD%E0%B8%A3%E0%B9%8C%E0%B9%80%E0%B8%8B%E0%B9%87%E0%B8%99%E0%B8%95%E0%B9%8C/): คำนวณเปอร์เซ็นต์ — X% of a number, percentage of part, and percentage increase/decrease.

## Articles (บทความ)

Long-form Thai explainers with formulas, worked examples, and official source citations:
- Article index: https://www.kamnuanlek.com/%E0%B8%9A%E0%B8%97%E0%B8%84%E0%B8%A7%E0%B8%B2%E0%B8%A1/

## About

Kamnuanlek.com (คำนวณเลข) is a free, ad-supported Thai calculator platform. All tax rates, social security thresholds, electricity tariffs, and official rates are sourced from Thai government agencies: Revenue Department (rd.go.th), Social Security Office (sso.go.th), Energy Regulatory Commission (erc.or.th), MEA (mea.or.th), PEA (pea.co.th), and Bank of Thailand (bot.or.th). Content is in Thai. Updated for Buddhist Era 2569 (2026 CE).
